title: Agent Query Session (agent-query-session v1.0)
description: Structured session built from a query result, capturing resolved bundle provenance for agentic workflows.

resolved_bundles.description: Unique set of bundle/repo identifiers that contributed hits or were successfully queried.

hits_count.description: Number of hits present in the projected context bundle.

context_source.description: Indicates which data sources were used to build the session.

federation_bundle_count.description: Total number of bundles attempted in the federation query, or null for non-federated sessions.

federation_effective_count.description: Number of bundles that were effectively queried (not filtered or skipped), or null for non-federated sessions.
